subcodes.first_line: It is evident that the reality of Divinity possesseth infinite bounty, and that the outpourings of divine grace can know no cessation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اين معلوم است که حقيقت الوهيّت را فيضی نامتناهی و تجلّيات رحمانيّه را انقطاعی جائز نه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @divine emanation is ceaseless; eternal, @poems and quotation from poetry
